# [PE_164](../PE_164.java)

Simple recursion with pruning and memoization. 

Some results in the form  
`<digits> <time in ms>: <number count>`

<details>
<summary>Results up to 2^5 digits</summary>

```
2^1 0 ms: 45
2^2 0 ms: 990
2^3 0 ms: 783057
2^4 1 ms: 481357047859
2^5 1 ms: 9191943857127677990
```
</details>

Using BigInteger we can increase that to:
<details>
<summary>BigInteger results up to 2^13 digits</summary>

```
2^1  1 ms: 45
2^2  1 ms: 990
2^3  1 ms: 783057
2^4  1 ms: 481357047859
2^5  1 ms: 183351381292456361189414
2^6  1 ms: 26601712486354484422053873906786439468355867213
2^7  3 ms: 559964395285672276055570748919708430459799636832766060073773944623764978230834326369510375398
2^8  8 ms: 248120158968627981658570171690845339789092715269047134795665992385098734629754034897757300949859272023706030667806166644934709821190517439314560224313826198415570770227845261199196424811
2^9  18 ms: 
2^10 40 ms: 
2^11 74 ms: 
2^12 263 ms: 
2^13 1018 ms: 
```
</details>
